ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "bool_col" INTEGER /* Boolean value */,
  "tinyint_col" TEXT /* Tinyint value */,
  "smallint_col" TEXT /* Smallint value */,
  "int_col" INTEGER /* Int value */,
  "bigint_col" TEXT /* Bigint value */,
  "float_col" REAL /* Float value */,
  "double_col" TEXT /* Double value */,
  "date_string_col" TEXT /* Date string value */,
  "string_col" TEXT /* String value */,
  "timestamp_col" TEXT /* Timestamp value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data point */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data category */,
  "data_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data subcategory */,
  "data_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_unit_id") REFERENCES data_units ("data_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("data_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_subcategory_id") REFERENCES data_subcategories ("data_subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point type */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_types_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_types_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timestamps" (
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestamp */,
  "timestamp_value" TEXT /* Timestamp value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_timestamps" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point timestamp */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_timestamps_timestamp_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestamp_id") REFERENCES timestamps ("timestamp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_timestamps_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_ownership" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point ownership */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_ownership_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_ownership_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_comments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point comment */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_comments_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "data_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "data_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_subcategories" (
  "data_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data subcategory */,
  "data_subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the data subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data subcategory */,
  "data_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_subcategories_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("data_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "data_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data unit */,
  "data_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the data unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_unit_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data point
Timestamp when the data point was created
ID of the user who created the data point
Unique identifier for each data type
Unique identifier for each data point type
Unique identifier for each data point timestamp
